title: Manorajyam
overview: Manu Keraleeyan, a Melbourne businessman, falls for a Malayali girl. His friend Bluetooth Ravi flirts online, while another friend's wife elopes with a guy she met online. Testing his wife's loyalty triggers a chain reaction that transforms his life.
